task_params.title: Patient Safety Basics Review
safety_points: hand hygiene before and after every patient contact
use gloves and PPE when exposure risk is present
confirm patient identity before care tasks
keep bed low and call light within reach
lock wheelchair and bed brakes during transfers
report changes in vital signs or condition promptly
follow fall prevention steps and clear trip hazards
document care accurately and right away
